data.title: DefiLlama launches new airdrop query function, supporting SOL and EVM addresses
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the data analysis platform DefiLlama has launched an airdrop check tool. Users can view eligible airdrop projects by entering SOL or EVM addresses. The tool has been launched on DefiLlama's airdrop page, and also provides a list of token-free protocols and a collection link.

data.title: BONK will destroy 2.025 trillion BONK, equivalent to approximately $36.956 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to official news, the Meme project BONK announced that it will destroy 2.025 trillion BONKs, worth approximately US$36.956 million.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Industry Faces Significant Losses In January 2025
data.description: According to Foresight News, the cryptocurrency industry experienced substantial financial losses in January 2025, totaling approximately $98.19 million. Data compiled by SlowMist indicates that there were 40 hacking incidents during this period, resulting in losses amounting to $87.94 million. Of this amount, $1.47 million was successfully recovered. Additionally, Scam Sniffer's monitoring identified 9,220 victims, with total losses reaching $10.25 million.

data.title: Circle CEO: The US government needs a programmable digital dollar and smart contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire said in a post on X: "The U.S. government needs programmable digital dollars and smart contracts."

data.title: OKX will officially launch BERA/USDT perpetual contract on the web, App and API, supporting 50x leverage
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, OKX will officially launch the BERA/USDT perpetual contract on the web, App and API at 22:00 (UTC+8) on February 6, 2025, supporting up to 50 times leverage, and will launch BERA's leveraged trading and simple coin earning at 12:00 noon on February 7, 2025 (UTC+8).

data.title: A whale who invested $11 million in Berachain ecosystem NFT received about 1.466 million BERA airdrops
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Berachain Ecosystem NFT Whale @Cbb0fe disclosed his BERA airdrop screenshot on X, and received a total of 1,465,932 BERA airdrops. He said that in the past two years, he has invested a total of 11 million US dollars to accumulate a large number of Berachain Ecosystem NFTs.

data.title: CME’s January average daily cryptocurrency trading volume hit a record high, with notional value reaching $13.6 billion
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News CME Group announced its market statistics for January 2025. The number of platform contracts reached 25.7 million, setting a record for the highest average daily trading volume (ADV) in January, an increase of 2% year-on-year.
In terms of cryptocurrencies, the average daily trading volume of cryptocurrencies in January set a record of 198,000 contracts (notional value of US$13.6 billion), and ADV increased by 180% year-on-year, including:
The average daily trading volume of micro Bitcoin futures increased by 255% to 84,000 contracts;
The average daily trading volume of micro Ethereum futures increased by 223% to 69,000 contracts.

data.title: UK Economic Data Strengthens Case For Monetary Easing
data.description: According to Odaily, IG Group market analyst Chris Beauchamp has highlighted that recent economic data supports the Bank of England's case for easing monetary policy. The UK is experiencing a continued decline in inflation, sluggish economic growth, and signs of a cooling labor market. Statements from Governor Bailey will significantly influence the pace and extent of future interest rate cuts. February's economic forecasts may provide justification for rate reductions, and traders will closely monitor any downward revisions, which could further bolster the argument for monetary easing. The baseline scenario suggests a 25 basis point rate cut, with guidance indicating gradual reductions throughout 2025. A more moderate surprise could involve the Bank of England signaling an accelerated pace of rate cuts. The least likely but most impactful scenario would be a substantial 50 basis point cut, potentially causing significant market volatility across various asset classes.

data.title: JTO and SCR 24-hour transaction volume climbed, Gate.io transaction share ranked second only to CoinHost
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News CoinGecko data shows that, perhaps due to the launch of Upbit, the daily trading volume of JTO and SCR has risen, exceeding US$120 million and US$54 million respectively. Among them, Gate.io's trading share ranks second in the world, second only to Binance.

data.title: Analysis: Bitcoin whales are still hoarding, with 135 more wallets holding more than 100 BTC in February
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Santiment published an article on X saying that during the mid-term decline and major volatility of cryptocurrencies, Bitcoin whales are hoarding more tokens. For small retail traders, especially those who entered the market for the first time in the past 6 months, volatility led to their liquidation. 
Overall, the number of wallets holding more than 100 BTC increased by 135 in February, while the number of wallets holding less than 100 BTC decreased by 138,680. This is an ideal setting for the rise in the market value of cryptocurrencies, even if it takes weeks (or even months) to see the general bullish impact of whales absorbing tokens.
